contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 105
- Description: AUM: dedicated /aum page + per-ledger click-through on /treasury
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/134
  
  Details:
  Operator feedback on truesight.me/index.html: 'the View per-currency / per-ledger breakdown after clicked feels a little too much stuff shoved in there... Perhaps its own page and then assets by ledger too?' Plus a parallel ask on /treasury: 'I wonder on each ledger could we click to see the ledger itself?'
  
  Both ship in one move, mirroring the /treasury pattern shipped yesterday.
  
  1. tokenomics#304 (squash 2640d1e, deployed @10):
     - ledger_urls dict in the computeTreasuryBreakdown() payload — resolved Google Sheets URL for every ledger in Shipment Ledger Listing, plus Main Ledger explicitly via ledgerDocId
     - &refresh=1 query param on doGet — operator escape hatch to bypass the PropertiesService cache when schema changes (used here to warm the cache with the new field without waiting for the next cron)
  
  2. truesight_me_beta#134 (squash 26947f7, prod cherry-pick 25a6a9e):
     a. NEW /aum page consuming treasury-cache/dao_offchain_treasury.json. Two sections:
        - Assets by ledger FIRST (the dimension operator specifically flagged as missing) — each managed ledger expanded to show currencies it holds
        - Per currency SECOND — each currency expanded to its per-ledger split
        Per-ledger USD per currency is estimated proportionally from total_value_usd / total_quantity since the cache stores quantities-per-ledger not USD-per-ledger. Methodology footer explains the relationship to the landing-page AUM scalar (GAS-computed; may differ slightly) and to /treasury (stricter DAO-owned-only cut).
     b. /treasury per-AGL rows now click-through to the source Google Sheet via ledger_urls. Same pattern propagated to /aum.
     c. Landing AUM card flipped from inline <details class='stat-breakdown' data-breakdown='aum'> to 'View breakdown →' link, matching what /treasury did yesterday.
     d. ~85 lines of dead JS removed from index.html (wireStatBreakdowns, fetchTreasuryCacheOnce, renderUsdTreasuryBreakdown, renderAumBreakdown) since no <details class='stat-breakdown'> elements remain on the landing page.
  
  Also marked the AUM follow-up entry (parked yesterday) as Recently shipped in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS (agentic_ai_context#173).
  
  CNAME-safe prod promotion: cherry-picked 26947f7 onto truesight_me_prod main, rebased through a stats-refresh race, push verified CNAME still 'truesight.me' post-push. NOT 'gh repo sync --force'.
  
  PRs:
  - TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#304 (squash 2640d1e)
  - TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#134 (squash 26947f7, prod cherry-pick 25a6a9e)
  - TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#173 (Recently shipped entry)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 175.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
